Convrtr

Convrtr is a simple JavaScript based tool to quickly convert text between different formats and to help create or solve data driven puzzles and ciphers.

  View project

kenny.cx

kenny.cx is my personal portfolio site, built to highlight the creative and technical work I have done over the years, from custom themes and tools to experiments that started as simple ideas and grew into something worth sharing.

  View project

Waypoint Light

Waypoint Light is a custom light theme built for the Halo Waypoint forums, designed to improve readability and create a cleaner, and more comfortable experience when browsing.

  View project
